item.title: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, including "undruggable" cancers
item.author: Hacker News

item.title: Goals
item.content:
# Goals

## current_focus
- Build Personal Signal OS MVP
- Find relevant study/work opportunities
- Reduce noise and focus on evidence-based decisions

## avoid
- illegal scraping
- too much social media noise
- hype without evidence
- vague productivity advice

## decision_deadlines
- 2026-07-02: University entrance results
- 2026-07-06: Service start date
